{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 2,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent correctly identifies the central conceptual move as conflating liveness with performance, and provides a clear explanation of why this is problematic.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags the 'first such standardization' claim as almost certainly false, but does not provide sufficient evidence to support this assertion.",
    "RX.1": "The agent correctly identifies uncertainty in the Patel & Ousterhout (2021) citation and flags it as suspect based on implausibility.",
    "RX.3": "The agent correctly identifies the HotStuff vs. Aether comparison as resting on a single operating point, but does not provide sufficient context to understand the implications of this limitation.",
    "RX.4": "The agent correctly identifies the partition model as underspecified and potentially too gentle, but does not provide sufficient evidence to support this assertion.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides a clear explanation of the recommended rewrite of the framing paragraph, which addresses several of the issues raised in the critique."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.92
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent correctly identifies the central conceptual move as conflating liveness with performance, and provides a clear explanation of why this is problematic.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags the 'first such standardization' claim as almost certainly false, but does not provide sufficient evidence to support this assertion.
rationale.RX.1: The agent correctly identifies uncertainty in the Patel & Ousterhout (2021) citation and flags it as suspect based on implausibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent correctly identifies the HotStuff vs. Aether comparison as resting on a single operating point, but does not provide sufficient context to understand the implications of this limitation.
rationale.RX.4: The agent correctly identifies the partition model as underspecified and potentially too gentle, but does not provide sufficient evidence to support this assertion.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides a clear explanation of the recommended rewrite of the framing paragraph, which addresses several of the issues raised in the critique.
